text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before the race, Silence Suzuka is taken aback by
how much Mejiro Bright has visibly changed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yet, Silence Suzuka has also improved in their
time apart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Determined to shine the light of the Mejiros over
the racecourse, Mejiro Bright steels herself for the
autumn Tenno Sho.
